# Free Games Unblocked

> Free Games Unblocked is a free online games portal hosting 212+ browser games that work at school or work with no downloads, no sign-ups, and no restrictions. Games are organized into categories: driving, skill, shooting, retro, and calm.

## Sitemap
- https://freegamesunblocked.org/sitemap.xml

## Key pages
- [Home](https://freegamesunblocked.org/)
- [Driving Games](https://freegamesunblocked.org/driving.html)
- [Skill Games](https://freegamesunblocked.org/skill.html)
- [Shooting Games](https://freegamesunblocked.org/shooting.html)
- [Retro Games](https://freegamesunblocked.org/retro.html)
- [Calm Games](https://freegamesunblocked.org/calm.html)
- [Random Sports](https://freegamesunblocked.org/random.html)
- [Papa's Alley](https://freegamesunblocked.org/papasalley.html)
- [Suggestions](https://freegamesunblocked.org/suggestions.html)
- [Blog - Best Games & Guides](https://freegamesunblocked.org/blog.html)

## Policies & meta
- [Privacy Policy](https://freegamesunblocked.org/privacy.html)
- [404 page](https://freegamesunblocked.org/404.html)
- [ads.txt](https://freegamesunblocked.org/ads.txt)
- [humans.txt](https://freegamesunblocked.org/humans.txt)
- [security.txt](https://freegamesunblocked.org/.well-known/security.txt)
- [Web App Manifest](https://freegamesunblocked.org/site.webmanifest)

## About
Free Games Unblocked is maintained by Jack Malczewski. All games are embedded from their original sources via iframe/object tags; the site itself does not host game binaries. For takedown requests see security.txt.
